 SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_INPP_COINS_OS 
TYPE:

LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE:

COMMENT: 
This variable was only populated from 2007–2012. It will only be populated if the plan has an 
enhanced benefit design with extra coverage in the gap. The coverage gap is technically referred to as 
the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. Plans that
